description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a minimalist design, featuring four straight legs and a flat, smooth tabletop. The wood grain is visible across the entire surface, giving it a natural and warm appearance. Each leg is capped with a metallic accent at the bottom, likely brass or gold-colored metal, adding a touch of elegance and contrast to the otherwise simple structure. The table has no visible drawers, handles, or additional components, emphasizing its clean lines and functional form. The proportions suggest it is suitable for use as a writing desk, dining table, or work surface in urban environments. Its sturdy construction and neutral color palette make it versatile for various settings, from modern offices to public spaces.
description: A rectangular wooden table with four straight legs, metallic-capped feet, and a smooth, natural wood finish. The design is minimalist and elegant, suitable for urban interiors or public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop, all four legs, and the metallic caps at the bottom of each leg.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the tabletop and the depth of the table, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the full width and all four legs with metallic caps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the table's depth and two legs.
